violations.text: Molluscan Shellfish (clams) located in the prep unit did not have the proper identification tags. Molluscan Shellstock tags must remain attached to the container in which the Molluscan Shellstock are received until the container is empty. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Dishwasher was taken out of service and must not be used until it is repaired. Please email inspector proof of repair. Per person in charge, establishment will use the 3-bay sink until dishwasher was repaired. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

Chlorine sanitizer solution was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025

The facility is lacking a mop sink. At least one mop sink or one curbed cleaning facility equipped with a floor drain must be provided and conveniently located for the cleaning of mops or similar wet floor cleaning tools and for the disposal of mop water and similar liquid waste. Per person in charge, establishment is in the process of getting a service sink. Please email inspector proof of service sink installation. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/18/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Please enroll additional employees in a food safety course and email inspector proof of completion of a food safety course. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2023

The dishwasher failed to wash his/her hands between loading soiled and unloading clean dishes from the dishwasher. Food employees must clean their hands after handling soiled equipment or utensils. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2023
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2023

Cheese was observed not marked with the date of preparation in the walk-in cooler. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2023
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods (Caesar salad dressing and steak) on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2023

A sanitizing bucket was stored on the prep table. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2023

Wet wiping cloths are not stored in a chemical sanitizer between uses. Wet wiping cloths must be stored in a chemical sanitizer at the appropriate concentration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2023

The fry basket located on the hanging rack was not in good repair. Metal wires are frayed and broken. An employee elected to dispose of the fry basket during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2023
The storage shelves, used to store equipment, located above the mixer are not in good repair. Paint is chipping. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine and soda machine have an accumulation of biofilm and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2023

The facility is lacking a mop sink. At least one mop sink or one curbed cleaning facility equipped with a floor drain must be provided and conveniently located for the cleaning of mops or similar wet floor cleaning tools and for the disposal of mop water and similar liquid waste. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2023

Employees' shoes were observed stored on the food storage rack in the dry storage area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2023
